name: Alpha Performance Center
about: Alpha Performance Center is a state-of-the-art performance facility specializing in physical therapy, golf fitness, and golf simulation. The venue offers a comprehensive approach to golf improvement, beginning with a mobilize, stabilize, and optimize process to enhance physical performance for the golf swing. Services are provided on an individual basis, through membership programs, or via a package system that allows for flexible usage over one year. The center is conveniently located in the Village of Pittsford and provides members with daily access to the golf simulator and other amenities via fingerprint or code entry.
why_golfers_like_it: Integrated performance therapy for injury prevention and game improvement
Unlimited simulator access included with membership tiers
Focus on physical optimization specific to golf biomechanics

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services provided.
No information on alcohol services provided.

simulator_hardware.notes: Foresight Sports golf simulator and lounge

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, though rentals or fittings may be available; contact the venue directly for specific details.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information on external food and drink policies; contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified; it is likely dependent on simulator software and booking duration.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is not marketed as kid-friendly and focuses on adult and collegiate-level performance and therapy.
